{{!-- Root listing template (route.type "post_index" / combined default root). This docs theme ships with features.post_index = false, so a Markdown front page is rendered through page.html and this template is used only when a site opts back into a generated post index. It renders a navigational overview rather than a single content body, so — like archive and tag listings — it is intentionally NOT marked as a Pagefind search body. Real searchable content lives in page.html / post.html, which carry data-pagefind-body. --}}

{{site.title}}

{{#if site.description}}

{{site.description}}

{{/if}} {{#if menus.primary.items}}

Start

    {{#for group in menus.primary.items}}
  • {{group.title}} {{#if group.children}}
      {{#for item in group.children}}
    • {{item.title}}
      • {{/for}}
    {{/if}}
    • {{/for}}
{{/if}}
{{partial:toc}}
